access.denied: You don't have access to this request.
access.notOwner: This request doesn't belong to your account.
access.forbidden: You don't have permission to perform this action.

transfer.sameAgent: Source and target agent must be different.
transfer.noPending: There is no pending transfer request for this ticket.
transfer.duplicatePending: A transfer request is already pending for this ticket.
transfer.wrongAgent: Only the target agent can approve or decline this transfer.
transfer.alreadyAssigned: This ticket is already assigned to that agent.

capacity.invalidLimit: Agent ticket limit must be at least 1.

validation.titleTooLong: Title must be 200 characters or fewer.
validation.resolutionNote: Resolution note must be at least 10 characters.
validation.worklogDuration: Worklog duration must be greater than zero.
validation.fileType: This file type is not allowed.
validation.duplicateEmail: A user with this email address already exists.

workflow.unavailable: The workflow service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
workflow.notAwaitingApproval: This request is not waiting for customer approval.
workflow.conflict: This action conflicts with the ticket's current state. Refresh and try again.

session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

generic.server: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again later.

closure.customerNotAllowed: That closure reason cannot be used when closing a request as a customer.
